description: You are a post-production audio editor at Clearwater Documentary Films, preparing a narration recording for the nature documentary 'Rivers of the Pacific Northwest.' Following the production notes at /home/ga/Audio/production_notes.txt, edit the narration in the open Ardour session 'MyProject'. Import /home/ga/Audio/samples/narration.wav onto a track named 'Narration - David Chen'. Remove the middle segment of the narration by splitting the region at 10 and 20 seconds from its start. Apply fade-ins and fade-outs of at least 0.3 seconds to the remaining segments. Place location markers named 'Intro' near the beginning and 'Conclusion' at or after the final segment. Export the session mix as a WAV file containing 'narration' in the filename to /home/ga/Audio/documentary_export/.
